3 Performing Taxonomically Informed Metabolite Annotation

Adriano Rutz

2025-04-02

Source: vignettes/articles/III-processing.Rmd
III-processing.Rmd

This vignette describes how Taxonomically Informed Metabolite Annotation is performed. If you followed all previous steps successfully, this should be a piece of cake, you deserve it!

targets::tar_make(names = tidyselect::matches("ann_pre$"))
#> + par_def_wei_ann dispatched
#> Welcome to tima
#> To cite tima in publications use:  Rutz A, Allard P (2024). _tima: Taxonomically Informed Metabolite
#>   Annotation_. doi:10.5281/zenodo.5797920
#>   <https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.5797920>, R package, version 2.11.0.  Adriano Rutz; Miwa Dounoue-Kubo; et al. (25 October 2019).
#>   Taxonomically Informed Scoring Enhances Confidence in Natural
#>   Products Annotation. Frontiers in Plant Science. 10: 1329.
#>   doi:10.3389/FPLS.2019.01329. issn:1664-462X. pmc:PMC6824209.
#>   pmid:1708947. qid:Q91218352.To see these entries in BibTeX format, use 'format(<citation>,
#> bibtex=TRUE)', or 'toBibtex(.)'.
#> ✔ par_def_wei_ann completed [0.025 seconds, 4.976 kilobytes]
#> + par_usr_wei_ann dispatched
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:08:51] Loading default params
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:08:51] All params
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:08:51] Small params
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:08:51] Advanced params
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:08:51] Changing params
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:08:51] Changing filenames
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:08:52] Exporting params
#> Running pipeline ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■                 61/126
#> ✔ par_usr_wei_ann completed [1.282 seconds, 1.739 kilobytes]
#> Running pipeline ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■                 61/126+ par_wei_ann dispatched
#> Running pipeline ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■                 61/126✔ par_wei_ann completed [0.001 seconds, 922 bytes]
#> Running pipeline ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■                 61/126+ ann_pre dispatched
#> Running pipeline ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■                 61/126TRACE [2025-04-02 11:08:52] Loading files ...
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:08:52] ... components
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:08:52] ... edges
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:08:52] ... structure-organism pairs
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:05] ... canopus
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:05] ... formula
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:06] ... annotations
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:08] Initial annotations:
#> INFO [2025-04-02 11:09:08] # A tidytable: 6 × 2
#> # Groups:      candidate_library
#>   candidate_library      n
#>   <chr>              <int>
#> 1 TIMA MS1          250053
#> 2 ISDB - Wikidata     4556
#> 3 SIRIUS               479
#> 4 merlin               156
#> 5 gnps                 139
#> 6 massbank              31
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:08] Re-arranging annotations
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:10] Adding biological organism metadata
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:10] Performing taxonomically informed scoring
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:13] Calculating biological score at all levels ...
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:13] ... domain
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:13] ... kingdom
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:13] ... phylum
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:13] ... class
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:13] ... order
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:13] ... family
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:13] ... tribe
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:13] ... genus
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:13] ... species
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:13] ... varietas
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:13] Keeping best biological score
#> INFO [2025-04-02 11:09:14] Taxonomically informed metabolite annotation led to 
#> 42595 annotations reranked at the kingdom level, 
#> 42225 annotations reranked at the phylum level, 
#> 36702 annotations reranked at the class level, 
#> 10451 annotations reranked at the order level, 
#> 8463 annotations reranked at the family level, 
#> 1258 annotations reranked at the tribe level, 
#> 971 annotations reranked at the genus level, 
#> 384 annotations reranked at the species level, and 
#> 0 annotations reranked at the variety level. 
#> WITHOUT TAKING CONSISTENCY SCORE INTO ACCOUNT! (for later predictions)
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:15] Calculating chemical consistency of features with at least 2 neighbors
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:15] Among all edges
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:15] ... at the (classyfire) kingdom level
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:15] ... at the (NPC) pathway level
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:15] ... at the (classyfire) superclass level
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:15] ... at the (NPC) superclass level
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:16] ... at the (classyfire) class level
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:17] ... at the (NPC) class level
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:18] ... at the (classyfire) parent level
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:19] Splitting already computed predictions
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:20] Joining all except -1 together
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:21] Adding already computed predictions back
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:23] Calculating chemical score at all levels ...
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:23] ... (classyfire) kingdom
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:23] ... (NPC) pathway
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:23] ... (classyfire) superclass
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:23] ... (NPC) superclass
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:23] ... (classyfire) class
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:23] ... (NPC) class
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:23] ... (classyfire) parent
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:23] ... keeping best chemical score
#> INFO [2025-04-02 11:09:25] Chemically informed scoring led to 
#> 39319 annotations reranked at the (classyfire) kingdom level, 
#> 27510 annotations reranked at the (NPC) pathway level, 
#> 21588 annotations reranked at the (classyfire) superclass level, 
#> 12009 annotations reranked at the (NPC) superclass level, 
#> 21588 annotations reranked at the (classyfire) class level, 
#> 12009 annotations reranked at the (NPC) class level, and 
#> 11997 annotations reranked at the (classyfire) parent level. 
#> WITHOUT TAKING CONSISTENCY SCORE INTO ACCOUNT!
#> INFO [2025-04-02 11:09:25] Filtering top 1 candidates and keeping only MS1 candidates with minimum 0 biological score OR 0 chemical score 
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:25] Keeping high confidence candidates only
#> INFO [2025-04-02 11:09:25] Removed 253682 low confidence candidates out of the 255833 total ones.
#> INFO [2025-04-02 11:09:25] 2151 high confidence candidates remaining.
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:25] Adding initial metadata (RT, etc.) and simplifying columns
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:30] Selecting columns to export
#> TRACE [2025-04-02 11:09:30] Adding consensus again to droped candidates
#> INFO [2025-04-02 11:09:32] Directory data/processed/20250402_110932_example created.
#> INFO [2025-04-02 11:09:32] ... path to used parameters is data/processed/20250402_110932_example
#> INFO [2025-04-02 11:09:32] ... path to used parameters is data/processed/20250402_110932_example
#> INFO [2025-04-02 11:09:32] ... path to export is data/processed/20250402_110932_example/example_results.tsv
#> Running pipeline ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■  126/126
#> ✔ ann_pre completed [39.668 seconds, 2.239 megabytes]
#> Running pipeline ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■  126/126✔ ended pipeline [42.713 seconds, 4 completed, 122 skipped]

The final exported file is formatted in order to be easily imported in Cytoscape to further explore your data!

We hope you enjoyed using TIMA and are pleased to hear from you!

For any remark or suggestion, please fill an issue or feel free to contact us directly.

On this page

Developed by Adriano Rutz.

Site built with pkgdown 2.1.1.
